landing.heroTitle: Your video ad, ready before your coffee cools
landing.heroSubtitle: Upload a product photo and let ReklamlarAI produce a professional video ad — with industry-specific direction, voiceover and music — in minutes.
landing.heroNote: No credit card required · 14 industry templates · EN & TR
landing.howTitle: A publish-ready ad in three steps
landing.how1Desc: Upload your product photo or video, or simply describe what you sell.
landing.how2Desc: 14 industry templates from jewelry to restaurants; lighting, pacing and tone adjust automatically.
landing.how3Desc: Formats for Google Ads, Instagram and TikTok — with optional voiceover and music.
landing.featuresTitle: Agency quality, without the agency invoice
landing.feature1Desc: Macro sparkle for jewelry, steam and fire for restaurants: every industry gets its own scene language.
landing.feature2Desc: Smooth, cinematic ad scenes from a single product photo.
landing.feature3Desc: Natural voiceovers in English and Turkish, plus original music matched to your ad.
landing.feature4Desc: YouTube 16:9, Reels 9:16, feed 1:1 — right duration, right ratio.
landing.feature5Desc: Veo, Kling and more: quality tiers for every budget.
landing.feature6Desc: See the exact credit cost of every video before you generate. No surprises.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Every plan includes all core features. Credits are spent on generations; failed generations are refunded automatically.
landing.faq1A: Each generation's credit cost depends on the AI model and video duration, and is shown clearly before you generate. If a generation fails, your credits are refunded automatically.
landing.faq2A: 16:9 for YouTube and Google Ads, 9:16 for Instagram Reels and TikTok, 1:1 for feed posts. Durations range from 5 to 30 seconds based on platform recommendations.
landing.faq3Q: Can I use my own visuals?
landing.faq3A: Yes. Upload a product photo to animate it, restyle an existing video, or generate from scratch with just a text description.
landing.faq4A: Yes, with one click. Your credits stay usable until the end of the period; after cancellation, pack and rollover credits are frozen and restored if you resubscribe.
landing.faq5Q: Do I own commercial rights to the videos?
landing.faq5A: Yes. On paid plans, every video you generate can be used commercially anywhere, including paid advertising.
landing.ctaTitle: Your first ad is 2 minutes away
landing.ctaSubtitle: Start with 20 credits — no credit card required.
landing.footerTagline: The AI-powered video ad studio for businesses.

auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

create.modeI2vDesc: Bring your product photo to life

create.voiceoverDesc: AI reads your script with a natural voice
create.musicDesc: Original background music matched to your ad
create.insufficient: Not enough credits. Buy a pack or upgrade your plan.

create.errPLAN_REQUIRED: This feature requires a higher plan.
create.errSUBMIT_FAILED: Generation could not start; your credits were refunded. Please try again.
create.errINPUT_MEDIA_REQUIRED: Please upload an image or video.
create.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

videos.watermarkNotice: Free plan preview — upgrade to download without watermark.
videos.processingHint: Your video is being generated. You can leave this page; it will appear here when ready.
videos.failedHint: Generation failed and your credits were refunded.

billing.packsNote: Packs require an active subscription; subscriptions are always the better deal.
billing.paymentsSoon: Payments are launching very soon. Meanwhile, generate with your welcome credits.
billing.subscriptionRequired: Subscribe to a plan before buying packs.
